lenses.guidance: vv 43-45's three-fold refrain — 'the LORD gave Israel all the land... the LORD gave them rest... not one of all the LORD's good promises failed' — closes the partition narrative. The structural triad is theological summary; the land-conquest book ends in benediction.

v 45's 'not one of all the LORD's good promises... failed' threads to 2 Cor 1:20 ('all God's promises are Yes in Christ'). The canonical line connects the conquest's promise-keeping summary to the gospel's promise-fulfillment center.
